name: Raheja Imperia
summary: 406 cameras covering 58 floors across two wings of a premium South Mumbai tower.
challenge: A premium 58-floor, two-wing residential tower in Lower Parel needed comprehensive, discreet coverage worthy of one of South Mumbai's most prestigious addresses.
solution: Konect engineered four cameras per floor across both wings — 406 cameras in total — with cabling and equipment planned around the building's vertical structure.
result: Every floor, lobby and common area is covered by a single coherent system, delivering the always-on security residents of a premium address expect.
